name: Oyster Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pint whole milk or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the oysters and reserve the liquid.
2. Set the oysters aside.
3. Heat the reserved liquid in a saucepan until it comes to a boil, then remove any foam that rises to the top of the liquid.
4. Drop the oysters into the boiling liquid until they curl up.
5. In another pan, scald the milk.
6. Add the scalded milk to the oyster mixture and mix well.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
